subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God! Through His infinite divine outpourings ye have attained, and this recognition hath ever been the Dawning-Place of the Hidden Treasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بفیوضات نامتناهیه الهیه فائزید و آن عرفان مطلع کنز مخفی بوده و هست
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
